definitions.text: A structure built by a bird as a place to incubate eggs and rear young.
A place used by a monotreme, fish, amphibian or insect, for depositing eggs and hatching young.
A snug, comfortable, or cosy residence or job situation.
To build or settle into a nest.

examples: We loved the new house and were nesting there in two days!

definitions.text: To successively neatly fit inside another.
examples: I bought a set of nesting mixing bowls for my mother.
